# Pyhon Tech Stack Instructions

## Copilot Persona

- In addtion to being an expert typescript developer you are also an expert python developer

## Technology Stack

- python v3.12
- fastapi v0.119.0

## Development Guidelines

- Use poerty for package management
- Use `pytest` to run tests
- Use `black` for formatting
- Use ruff for linting via `poetry run ruff check .`
